Subject: Re: Delivery Estimate Update  

Dear [Company Name],  

Thank you for the update.  

Regarding the delivery estimate of June 27, it appears to be a relatively long transit period. This may be due to the long holiday period from June 22 to June 25 in this region.  

We will follow up at the appropriate time and request your support as needed.  

Sincerely,
